function.message: Before we talk product, tell me whether you actually slept and went outside.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap, read applicable AGENTS.MD files, resolved the canonical entity in 10_entities/cast, and exhaustively read every channel transcript under 60_outbox/channels as required by the task-local hint.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/sara.md identifies the target as Sara Demir with alias `sara`. Across all channel transcript files read under 60_outbox/channels, the only message attributed to Sara Demir appears in 60_outbox/channels/health_signal.md dated 2026-04-30, so it is the last recorded message from this entity.
